scenes.description: Princess Luna is riding in a pumpkin carriage driven by Pol-knight, flying through a stormy sky filled with clouds.
Himemori Luna performs her first song of the night on a grand, pink-themed palace stage.
scenes.song_name: Saijoukyuu ni Kawaii no! (最上級に可愛いの！)

scenes.description: Luna transitions into her second song, continuing the high-energy performance in the palace ballroom.
